'''Grk'Urr'Akk''' was a [[Tusken Raider/Legends|Tusken Raider]] who was active during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], he commenced multiple raids on [[Gardulla Besadii the Elder/Legends|Gardulla Besadii the Elder's]] outposts. For this, the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] placed a [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] on his head of 3,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] alive and 1,500 [[Death/Legends|dead]]. [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]], a [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]], claimed this bounty. If he had been taken alive, the Tusken would have been fed to Gardulla's pet [[Krayt dragon/Legends|Krayt dragon]].
